description: Address code review issues: fix portal name-collision exposing health records, eliminate full-collection download, and handle orphaned records when name typed manually.
steps: In loadPortalTestKesehatan(), replace full-collection get() with two targeted Firestore queries: (1) where('userId','==',u.id) for records linked by userId, (2) a query for records where userId is empty/absent but name matches.
In the matching logic, use userId as PRIMARY match. Only fall back to name matching if the userId field is empty/absent on the record.

In simpanJadwalTestKesehatan(), when personId is empty (manual name entry), look up the person by name from the relevant collection (hrd_kandidat or hrd_karyawan) to populate userId/kandidatId. If lookup fails, leave as-is but still set the field.
acceptance_criteria: loadPortalTestKesehatan uses targeted where queries instead of full-collection get
Portal matching uses userId as primary key, name only as fallback for legacy records
simpanJadwalTestKesehatan attempts to resolve userId when personId is empty
verification: Grep simpanJadwalTestKesehatan for userId lookup logic
